test_result.targeted: cd agents && python -m pytest eval/test_llm_judge.py -q -> 23 passed
test_result.full_eval_llm_suite: cd agents && python -m pytest eval/ llm/ -q -> 230 passed, 0 failed
test_result.lint: cd agents && python -m ruff check eval/llm_judge.py eval/calibrate_judge.py eval/test_llm_judge.py -> All checks passed!

live_api_call_confirmation.method: every test uses _StubLLMClient(LLMClient) or httpx.MockTransport-backed OllamaClient; the only real-provider-construction code path (calibrate_judge.main() -> llm.factory.create_llm_client) is deferred-imported inside main() and is monkeypatched in the one CLI-smoke test that calls main(); no test imports OpenRouterClient/GeminiClient or reads .env

acceptance_criteria_status.defined_rubric_scoring: implemented -- JUDGE_RUBRIC_CRITERIA (correctness, completeness, citation_accuracy; 1-5 scale), build_judge_prompt, parse_judge_response, score_answer, score_arm_answers
acceptance_criteria_status.manual_spot_check_calibration_harness: implemented -- ManualRating/CalibrationSample/CalibrationReport, run_calibration, load_manual_ratings/write_report, runnable main() CLI
acceptance_criteria_status.test_spec_runnable_calibration_script_pr: satisfied via CLI-smoke test with monkeypatched client factory

architectural_integration.interceptor_wiring: score_answer() routes every judge call exclusively through agents.llm.interceptor.LLMInterceptor.call(); the resulting StageRecord is directly compatible with agents/eval/cost_latency.py's aggregate_by_stage/rollup_cost_per_1000_queries (proven by test_score_answer_record_is_aggregate_by_stage_compatible)
architectural_integration.shared_call_path_precedent: score_answer() is the single shared judge-scoring call path, mirroring agents/eval/pipeline.py's generate_final_answer pattern
architectural_integration.dataclass_scoring_structure_precedent: JudgeScore/JudgeScoringResult/CalibrationReport are frozen dataclasses with to_json(), mirroring agents/eval/metrics.py's QueryScore/ArmScore and agents/eval/ground_truth.py's serialization convention

explicitly_deferred: Live calibration run against real OpenRouter/Gemini judge-model outputs and real manually-rated answers -- deferred to a separate, deliberately-scoped run with its own explicit cost estimate, to be executed by the orchestrator, per this pass's binding scoping constraint. This code-only pass does not populate agents/eval/calibration_ratings.json or run agents/eval/calibrate_judge.py against a real provider.
Wiring llm_judge.score_arm_answers into agents/eval/run_benchmark.py -- that script is subtask 5.3.4, not yet built.
verification_note: Per invariant I4, this implementation run does NOT self-verify. Verification is dispatched separately via /cdr:verify against commit 8f7751c3215c0148b9d29beb637953b7bf90ae51.
